admission_process.title: Kalol Institute and Research Center Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Kalol Institute and Research Center admission 2025is a blend of both and entrance basis. The institute provides an extensive range of programmes at undergraduate, postgraduate, diploma, and certificate levels. Also known asKIRC, the institute accepts both national-level entrance exams and merit in the last qualifying exam depending on the programme. Students are offered the courses via various affiliated institutes and schools of KIRC. These includeKarol Institute of Technology,Karol Institute of Management,Ananya School of Nursing, and more. The following article contains important details regarding the courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and other admission-related information of KIRC.

Kalol Institute and Research Center course admissionis subject to clearance of the preset admission criteria. The institute admits students through either entrance or merit basis depending on the course selected. Further, candidates must provide valid entrance exam scores.KIRC coursesare offered in the fields of Engineering, Commerce, Management, Pharmacy, Nursing, etc. Aspiring students can take a look at the following table to know about the admission criteria for some of the popularKalol Institute and Research Center courses:

The admission process for the institute usually commences online. Students need to either register for ACPC counselling or directly at the institute's website for seat allocation. The process depends totally on the course of choice. Aspiring candidates must ensure that they satisfy the admission criteria of the programme before applying. Students can follow the steps explained below to complete theKIRC admission process:
Step 1: Application Process

The application can be filled out online at theACPC portalfor selective courses. Alternatively, candidates may also fill out the admission enquiry form available at the website to know about the application process of the desired programme.
Step 2: Selection Process

Students are selected based on several parameters, such as entrance exam scores (if applicable), merit in the last qualifying exam, etc. The institute accepts valid scores in national and state-level exams, such as GUJCET/. PGCET/ JEE Mains, etc. Further, merit-based admissions are also done.
Step 3: Admission confirmation
Seat allocation is primarily through ACPC counselling. Once a seat is offered, students need to go through document verification and pay theKIRC admission fees.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for M.E at Kalol Institute and Research Center?
faqs.answer: Kalol Institute and Research Center M.E. eligibilityis same across all of the offered specialisations. Candidates seeking to enrol into any of the offered M.E course at KIRC need to complete graduation. The graduation must be in a relevant field with a minimum aggregate of 55% (50% for reserved categories). As admissions are primarily merit-based for the programme, candidates need to apply quickly before the deadline.

reviews.review_heading: Modern infrastructure and supportive faculty, placement opportunities vary.
reviews.review_text: KIRC has good infrastructure with clean classrooms, projectors, Wi-Fi, and well-equipped labs. Library is quiet with a good book collection. Hostel rooms are furnished, and mess offers hygienic food. A canteen with affordable snacks is also available. Medical help is on campus. Sports like cricket, volleyball, and indoor games are encouraged, and a sports week is held yearly. Green campus adds to pleasant environment.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with college .
reviews.review_text: There is very good service. They provide us with a library for reading, Wi-Fi, labs for practicals, and faculty also help us in practicals. The classroom is also very nice. About the hostel, they serve us in a very nice way. The quantity of food is also very nice. There is a canteen also available. Medical facilities and a playground are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest you not to join here and don't waste your money and time here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very high here, and all the facilities are also available here. There are many courses like B.E, B.Sc, BBA, MBA, nursing, etc. The canteen is also good. There are many huge grounds for cricket, volleyball, tennis, etc. Wi-Fi is available everywhere on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and greenery but it is not good with placement and studies.
reviews.review_text: The campus was extremely beautiful. You won't find any other campus with such greenery. It had well-manicured lawns and lush green trees on the campus. There were 3 canteens and a cafeteria. The buildings of the campus were however not so well built. But the engineering department recently received a new building which was quite modern.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Kalol Institute and Research Center.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are pretty good for students who actually want to learn. The infrastructure is quite good as they maintain the greenery on campus. They also take care of the same all time. I don't have any idea about the hostel and the quality of food as I never went there, but I heard that it was good for the local Gujarati people. Mess and canteen are quite good, and there is a hospital inside the campus that will help with medications. There is value for sports in this college, and they also o...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely our college has a satisfying environment and culture, along with great placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best hostel facility, and girls have safety environment at this place. Students who come from far places can stay in the hostel and get the best food, medical and safety facilities in the hostel. A hospital is available on the campus. The food facility is also available. Moreover, there are sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are highly satisfactory. It had good placement records for the past 10 years.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our campus is very beautiful, and our campus has highly equipped labs and workshops. Our college canteen has proper hygiene and has a variety of cuisines. There is a huge library with all the academic books as well as general knowledge books. Every classroom has projector facilities for smart learning.

reviews.review_heading: Kalol Institute of Technology and Research Center is a good college for every student.
reviews.review_text: There are 4 computer labs in our college with about 30 computers and a moderate Wi-Fi facility. There are some old systems, and others are newly equipped. Canteen and sports facilities are quite good. The area of mess is very large.

reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied with good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities for courses are the labs of different technology, classrooms with projector, libraries with books, Wi-Fi facilities, landscaping facilities, infrastructure is very awesome with the separate floor of our department, teachers are very supportive. The food of hostel is of good quality and healthy, medical facilities is there as we have hospital in campus, sports facilities is also there as we have the biggest campus.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of staff.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities like computer lab, Wi-Fi, & RO drinking water are available in this college. This college has a big ground to play outdoor games like volleyball & cricket. The college also has hostel facilities and canteen which service quality food.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college, and faculty members were excellent in the past years.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the best I have ever seen, and there is a good student-friendly calm atmosphere here. The library is fully equipped with a huge source of reference books and regular study magazines. Classrooms are in very good condition though there is no Wi-Fi facility on the campus for students. There are two canteens on our campus, and one is in the basement, while another one is in the form of a cafe. These both canteens provide very hygienic food.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a good campus and better infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: I'm a mechanical engineering student, and the college provided all facilities related to our study. I don't stay in the hostel, so I don't know about the hostel facilities and mess food. Our college arranges every year sports week for every student.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of fewer practicals.
reviews.review_text: The best Wi-Fi network is available in the mechanical department, but there are less mechanical instruments in labs. The infrastructure of classrooms is the best and friendly atmosphere. The library is good. I don't have much idea of hostels and its facilities as my residence nearby college. The canteen is good. There is a great scope for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with all the facilities in the college but not satisfied with the fees structure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very attractive. There are well-maintained classrooms with almost 100 seating capacity. Even the campus is lush green. All the classrooms and labs are well designed. Even there are library facilities on the campus and students can utilise all the books in the library.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for those who can't take admission in other good colleges like LJ, LDRP and SAL.
reviews.review_text: The campus area is huge. From this year, all classrooms, labs and library are shifted to a new building, and that is quite bigger than the older one. Now they have a common student section. Classrooms are clean here. Labs are improving, and new PCs are being installed for a better experience in CAD and other educational software. For medical facilities, Adarsh Hospital is available on the campus. We have a common playground to organise sports and annual functions. The food offered in the canteen...

reviews_list.review_title: Our college is average and can get a degree at less fee.

review_content.Placements: Around 10% of students in our college got placed. The highest salary package offered was 3 LPA and the lowest salary package was 1.2 LPA. Top recruiters were IT companies. Few students got internships based on their talents.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities provided in our college were average. The hostel was average. The campus was not very big. The canteen was good to feed students. The quality of food served was average. Our college was good at sports. Students who were interested in sports could spend a good time but they were average in education.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Lord Krishna College of Technology.

review_content.Placements: There were no placements for our batch, and no one got placed from our senior batch. No company has visited the campus, and no roles were offered. No internships were offered. I enrolled in 2015, and all the faculty members lied with the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi facility is available. There were some poor labs and classrooms. The college did not provide facilities like a library, medical facilities, sports and games. Some labs are available, but practical sessions are not conducted.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Management (MBA) - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: The overall details to know about college LKCT.

review_content.Placements: College is poor in terms of placements. In 2017 there are four companies which came to our college but none of them is a big organization in its own. So in the way of placement it is less reliable. But college provides some opportunities to attend the campus placement. We can say that the placement facilities and abilities not so good at this moment in the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good if we compare the other colleges in terms of fees. The college has its own canteen as well. The playground is not so good but it has a library and a garden also for reading and chilling out. College also have good labs and rest room. College have two seperate buildings so the area of building is large and wonderful.

individual_reviews.title: Our college is average and can get a degree at less fee.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Lord Krishna College of Technology.

content.Placements: There were no placements for our batch, and no one got placed from our senior batch. No company has visited the campus, and no roles were offered. No internships were offered. I enrolled in 2015, and all the faculty members lied with the students.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Management (MBA) - Batch of 2017

content.Placements: College is poor in terms of placements. In 2017 there are four companies which came to our college but none of them is a big organization in its own. content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good if we compare the other colleges in terms of fees. The college has its own canteen as well. reviews.review_heading: The labs are really big.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi facility in the hostel, 24-hour hot water, and fresh drinking water. There is an option of shared rooms and separate rooms for individual accommodation. Hostel food is good. Classrooms are big and spacious and can accommodate a good number of students. There are labs with built-in AC and many conference rooms in them also.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is top notch with lecture halls, a good, vibrant campus, which has Makerspace for students, a computer lab, and also has infrastructure for research labs. The college hostel also has top-class facilities, but it is a bit expensive, so make note of that.

reviews.review_heading: Easy to get in, small campus, great professors, scholarship opportunities, hard to get a high CGPA.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel and there won't be one on this campus. The food is expensive but is nutritious and tastes good. There are issues with the Wi-Fi, and there is a lack of seating sometimes. Classrooms get packed and congested. We have a great library with wide-spaced study areas as well. They include public desktops (DELL and Apple). There are plenty of sports activities, inter-college activities, and weekly games at the VSA campus. We have an infirmary on site with a full-time nurse.

highlights.summary: Shreyarth University is a private university in Ahmedabad, Gujarat. At the UG, PG and Doctorate levels, the institute offers 26 courses across 5 specialisations in Full Time and Part Time modes. The popular Shreyarth University programs include MBA/PGDM, B.Sc., MCA, BCA and B.A. Shreyarth University courses are provided in several streams including Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Mass Communication & Media and Humanities & Social Sciences, etc. The institute has a total seat intake of 777 students. The fees at Shreyarth University ranges between INR 30,000 to 4,05,000 for the different courses. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: It has placement support, good infrastructure, and good and helpful teaching staff.

review_content.Placements: In BCA, almost 80% of students got placed through campus placements. The salary packages offered range from 1.2-3 LPA. The average package is around 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course include TCS, Infosys, IBM, Wipro, N&T, and TOPS Technologies. Around 70% of students also got internship opportunities, mostly through the college or in collaboration with companies like TOPS Technologies and other local firms. The top roles offered are software development, technical support, web development, and backend operations. Many students also got roles in data entry, QA, and testing domains.

reviews_list.review_title: College is good for those students who are interested in it or related fields.

Companies that are arriving at our campus are HCL, TCS, Wipro, IBM and other local companies. The roles are offered in various fields like app development, web development, etc.
